NAME.description: Primary label for the resource link.

DESCRIPTION.description: Markdown notes (second column). Avoid raw `|` characters (breaks GFM tables).

SUBTITLE.description: Optional longer label; may appear as an “Also known as” field on the card when it differs from ABBREVIATION.

ABBREVIATION.description: Optional short form shown in the card title, e.g. “BioBank Japan (BBJ)”.

NAME_ZH.description: Optional Chinese name (Simplified) for the resource; shown on cards when present (e.g. China-hosted databases).

DISPLAY_ORDER.description: Optional sort key within a country folder (lower first; default 0).

KEY_DATABASES.description: Optional sub-databases or portals; each row is a card field with link and optional prose.

NAME_ZH.description: Optional Chinese label for this portal row (Simplified).

DESCRIPTION.description: Optional markdown blurb under the portal link (inline links allowed; avoid raw `|`).
